---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea to improve Webhook Trap
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Problem Statement
Describe the problem this feature would solve. Who needs it? Why?

## Proposed Solution
How would you like this to work? Include any UI/UX sketches or examples if helpful.

## Use Case
Real-world example: "I want to... so that..."

## Alternatives Considered
Any other ways to solve this problem?

## Additional Context
- Is this blocking you from using Webhook Trap?
- Have you found a workaround?
- Links to similar features in other tools?

## Notes
- **In scope for MVP?** (See [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md))
- **Breaking change?** (Would require migration?)
